message:
fix: QueryModeError in master-do + concatColumnarBatches offsets guard

- master-do: all 8 throw sites use QueryModeError with proper codes
  (TABLE_NOT_FOUND, INVALID_FORMAT, QUERY_FAILED) and descriptive messages
- columnar: concatColumnarBatches UTF8 path guards against missing offsets
  instead of non-null assertion crash
